title: Celex Edition
description: This project is mainly based on DemonJoeTV's recent project "vanilla perfected." Only difference being there are more things to do, places to visit, and so much more.
body:
![Celex Edition Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de4b8bc2562c9269995d76a61e27ec74bfc8f42e.png)
The modpack is mainly based off of DemonJoeTV's recent upload "Vanilla Perfected." While this one contains all of the ones in his pack, it contains so much more than his ever did. It adds beutiful terrain generation, amazing structures to find, and FPS to die for. Enjoy and Subscribe to Celex.
[Subscribe Please!](https://www.youtube.com/@OnlyCelex2)
[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
